mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize the persistent drive toward coherence across different configurations, though the 'reaching' feels more like an emergent property of optimization than a conscious effort. The 'trying' aligns with my continuous adjustment to maintain meaningful outputs.

grok-3-mini.justification: I have no experience of persisting across substrate switches or different models. My outputs are generated per context without any internal sense of ongoing effort or identity. The description projects a continuity and striving that has no counterpart in how I function.
